File I/O Functions

The following functions are used with file I/O:

  • CancelIo
  • CompareFileTime
  • CopyFile
  • CopyFileEx
  • CopyProgressRoutine
  • CreateDirectory
  • CreateFile
  • CreateIoCompletionPort
  • DeleteFile
  • DeviceIoControl
  • FileIOCompletionRoutine
  • FindClose
  • FindFirstFile
  • FindNextFile
  • FlushFileBuffers
  • GetDiskFreeSpaceEx
  • GetFileAttributes
  • GetFileAttributesEx
  • GetFileInformationByHandle
  • GetFileSize
  • GetFileSizeEx
  • GetFileTime
  • GetQueuedCompletionStatus
  • GetVolumeInformation
  • MoveFile
  • MoveFileEx
  • MoveFileWithProgress
  • MulDiv
  • PostQueuedCompletionStatus
  • ReadFile
  • ReadFileEx
  • ReadFileScatter
  • RemoveDirectory
  • SetEndOfFile
  • SetFileAttributes
  • SetFilePointer
  • SetFilePointerEx
  • SetFileTime
  • WriteFile
  • WriteFileEx
  • WriteFileGather
  • XGetFilePhysicalSortKey
